_about: Hand-verified ground-truth PhD rosters for the 3 pilot chairs. Serves as the recall benchmark for PhD discovery (issue #47). Captured manually from each chair's official team page. status values: 'active' = current PhD/doctoral researcher (incl. anyone listed under a chair's 'Researcher' role, who is handled like a PhD by convention) and a valid recall target; 'incoming' = announced 'starting soon', NOT counted as an active recall target; 'associated' = externally/cross-affiliated PhD listed on the team page, NOT a core recall target. Former PhDs/alumni, dedicated postdocs, research engineers, group leaders and admin staff are intentionally excluded; notable exclusions are documented in each chair's 'notes'.

chairs.notes: Felix Kloss, Dr. Pavel Kolev and Dr. René Geist are listed under the 'Researcher' role and are counted as active PhDs per project convention (Researchers are handled like PhDs), even though Kolev and Geist already hold doctorates. Individual PhD profile URLs are not exposed on the team page. Former PhD alumni are excluded from this roster.
